verdict_reasoning: TGN46/TGN38 is a type I integral membrane protein predominantly at the trans-Golgi network but cycles constitutively through the plasma membrane via secretory vesicles before retrieval back to the TGN. This cycling produces a documented minority surface pool with the extracellular domain exposed at the outer leaflet — widely used experimentally as a PM-recycling marker. Dominant compartment is endomembrane, but a bona-fide surface fraction exists via its own TM anchor.
